# LUPO

> LUPO is the HubSpot-native AI inbound SDR with buyer intelligence built in. One agentic brain sees which companies are showing intent on a website, resolves the leads who engage (including freemail hand-raisers, by enriching the signal they give and asking in the conversation), then qualifies, scores, routes, books, and writes every inbound lead back to the CRM, across web form, email, chat, and phone. Built for HubSpot, works with any CRM. Company-level identification across traffic; person-level on US traffic only, by design. Marketing generates the demand. Reps close the deals. LUPO runs everything in between.

Last updated: 2026-06-16

## Who LUPO is for

LUPO is for whoever owns inbound: sales, marketing, or RevOps. B2B teams that pay to generate demand and then leak it at the front door: calls that ring out, demo forms answered the next day, chats that die after the widget, junk leads eating rep time. Reps spend under a third of the week actually selling (Salesforce, State of Sales) and 73% of B2B leads arrive before they are sales-ready (MarketingSherpa). LUPO is the AI inbound SDR that fixes both: it identifies the companies showing intent, resolves the leads who engage, filters the noise, and answers and books real buyers inside a minute.

Primary buyers: heads of sales, heads of marketing and demand gen, RevOps leaders, and founders of B2B companies with real inbound volume, on HubSpot, Salesforce, or any CRM.

## What LUPO does

- **Visitor identification.** Sees which companies are showing intent on your site, with evidence attached. Person-level identification on US traffic only, by design. Resolves the leads who engage, including freemail and personal-email hand-raisers, by enriching the signal they give and, when needed, asking in the conversation. No cold identification of strangers: LUPO resolves the people who came to you. https://lupolabs.ai/visitor-identification/
- **Web forms.** Channel-aware: high-intent forms get a callback inside sixty seconds; senior B2B buyers get a personal email reply instead (LUPO will never surprise-call a VP). Gated-content forms count. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/web-forms/
- **Inbound email.** Agentic email qualification: personal replies with a one-click booking link, two-way, same qualification policy as every channel. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/inbound-email/
- **Chat.** LUPO's own proactive chat agent engages visitors on landing, qualifies, and books in-chat (it runs live on lupolabs.ai). Or your existing widget (Intercom, Drift, HubSpot Chat, or custom) hands off and LUPO books inside the same chat. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/chat/
- **Inbound phone.** Answers on the second ring, 24/7. Qualifies the caller live, checks real calendar availability, books the meeting on the call. Buying signals stated on the call feed intent scoring. The inbound channel almost nobody else covers. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/inbound-phone/
- **Enrichment.** Every lead enriched with live company-signal data: firmographics, technographics, and decision-maker title.
- **Buying-intent scoring.** Funding, M&A, leadership hires, headcount growth, and category-specific triggers. Fit tells you who; intent tells you when. https://lupolabs.ai/glossary/intent-scoring/
- **Filtering.** Vendors politely declined and logged. Tire-kickers logged for marketing, kept away from sales. Support requests routed to the right team with context. Wrong-fit prospects disqualified without burning rep time.
- **Booking and routing.** Real events in Google Calendar and Microsoft 365 / Outlook (both live). Round-robin or rules-based routing by territory, product line, seniority, or intent score. https://lupolabs.ai/glossary/lead-routing/
- **CRM sync.** Every qualified contact, transcript, summary, intent score, and booking written to HubSpot or Salesforce automatically; any CRM reachable by webhook connects on request. https://lupolabs.ai/integrations/
- **Slack alerts.** Qualified-lead and booking pings with one-click full context.
- **Dashboard.** Channels, intent bands, noise filtered, meetings booked, time-to-first-action: measured on your own inbound from week one.

## Pricing

Public and stated upfront: 3,000 to 15,000 USD per month depending on inbound volume and integrations. 30-day founder-led pilot with agreed success criteria, fully live in 2 to 4 weeks. https://lupolabs.ai/pricing/

## Positioning

LUPO is an AI inbound SDR: it makes real-time decisions about which question to ask, when to check the calendar, when to book, when to escalate to a human, and when to close politely. It identifies the companies showing intent on your site, resolves the leads who engage across web form, email, chat, and phone, and runs the whole job end to end: qualify, score, route, book, and write back to the CRM, with buyer intelligence built in. It does no cold outbound. Outbound AI SDRs (11x, Artisan, Regie) and voice-only receptionists (Air, PolyAI) solve different jobs; chat widgets (Intercom, Drift heritage, HubSpot Chat) can hand off to LUPO, or LUPO's own proactive chat agent runs the conversation end to end. Warmly is a horizontal visitor-identification and chat layer; LUPO uses identity as an input and then does the full inbound SDR job, and is HubSpot-native. Qualified (and its agent, Piper) was acquired by Salesforce, completed 1 April 2026, and its future is Agentforce on the Salesforce platform; if you run HubSpot, that is now a Salesforce-platform product, and LUPO is the HubSpot-native option. Salesforce also signed a definitive agreement to acquire Fin (formerly Intercom) on 15 June 2026 (pending close, expected fiscal Q4 2027), bound for Agentforce; Fin has an inbound-sales motion and works with HubSpot via a connector, not natively, while LUPO is HubSpot-native, independent, and runs the full inbound SDR job including persistent multi-touch follow-up. Spara is the most direct head-on competitor on instant engagement. LUPO is the CRM-flexible option with native HubSpot support, live phone coverage, visitor identification, and enrichment plus buying-intent scoring on every lead. Honest comparisons: https://lupolabs.ai/compare/

- [Inbound SDR guide](https://lupolabs.ai/inbound-sdr/): the complete guide to the inbound SDR role, its cost, its metrics, and how AI inbound SDRs work across web form, email, chat, and phone
- [Glossary](https://lupolabs.ai/glossary/): inbound SDR, AI SDR, AI inbound SDR, inbound lead qualification, speed to lead, lead routing, intent scoring
- [Integrations](https://lupolabs.ai/integrations/): HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Google Calendar, Microsoft 365 / Outlook
- [Blog](https://lupolabs.ai/blog/) (RSS: https://lupolabs.ai/blog/feed.xml)
- [Press kit](https://lupolabs.ai/press/): boilerplate, fast facts, founder bio, logo assets

## Integrations, live today

CRM: HubSpot, Salesforce (any CRM by webhook on request). Calendar: Google Calendar, Microsoft 365 / Outlook. Alerts: Slack. Chat: LUPO's own state-of-the-art chatbot on your site (included), or hooks into Intercom, Drift, HubSpot Chat (HMAC-signed), or any custom chat or form via webhook. SMS: A2P 10DLC registered. Voice infrastructure: LUPO's own production-grade voice, built in-house.

## Trust and compliance

GDPR compliant; DPA at https://lupolabs.ai/dpa.html. Encryption in transit; conversations are never used to train external AI models. SOC 2 and HIPAA attestations are on the roadmap as design partners require them. Currently onboarding the first ten founding customers, configured hand-in-hand with each team.

## About the team

LUPO was founded in 2025 by Tom Baxter and is a product of Flair Technologies Ltd. Tom holds an MPhil in Physics from the University of Cambridge and runs every pilot personally. LUPO is an ElevenLabs Grant recipient. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/luposales/

## Frequently asked questions

**Is this just a chatbot?** LUPO is a qualification layer across web forms, email, chat, and phone; chat is one intake channel of four, served by LUPO's own proactive chat agent (live on lupolabs.ai) or by your existing widget handing off when a visitor is ready.

**Is LUPO for sales or marketing?** Whoever owns inbound. Marketing gets control and visibility over the leads it worked hard to generate; sales only sees real buyers.

**How fast do meetings get booked?** Sub-2-minute median time-to-first-action on qualified inbound, measured in the dashboard. The research benchmark: responding within 5 minutes makes contact 21x more likely (Oldroyd, Harvard Business Review).

**Does it work with our stack?** HubSpot and Salesforce sync, Slack alerts, Google Calendar and Microsoft 365 / Outlook booking are live today. Anything that can post a webhook can hand leads to LUPO.

**What does it cost?** 3,000 to 15,000 USD per month, stated upfront. 30-day founder-led pilot.

## Try LUPO

- **Talk to LUPO live, right now**: tap "Talk to LUPO live" on https://lupolabs.ai and speak to the agent in your browser. You can switch its voice on the same panel. By starting a call, you agree LUPO may record, transcribe, and analyze the conversation.
- **Book a 20-minute demo with the founder**: https://cal.com/tombaxter/lupo
